ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's website URL */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the school */,
  "is_charter" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the school is a charter school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "governance" TEXT /* Governance structure (e.g., board of education, independent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the district is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was founded */,
  "superintendent" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* District's website URL */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the district office */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the district office */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the district office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget belongs to */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is for */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget of the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Per student budget of the school */,
  "operational_budget" REAL /* Operational budget of the school */,
  "capital_budget" REAL /* Capital budget of the school */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the enrollment belongs to */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the enrollment data is for */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "grade_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing the distribution of students by grade */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing the distribution of students by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing the distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the score belongs to */,
  "score_year" INTEGER /* Year the score data is for */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level the scores are for */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of the school */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_rates" (
  "passing_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passing rate */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the passing rate belongs to */,
  "passing_rate_year" INTEGER /* Year the passing rate data is for */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level the passing rates are for */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "passing_math_rate" REAL /* Passing rate for math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" REAL /* Passing rate for reading */,
  "passing_both_rate" REAL /* Passing rate for both math and reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passing_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_rates_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., education administrator, school official, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the school data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user is accessing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the school data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., budget analysis, score report) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the report is public */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the detail belongs to */,
  "detail_type" TEXT /* Type of detail (e.g., budget amount, average score) */,
  "detail_value" TEXT /* Value of the detail */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the report the detail belongs to */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the detail is important */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
